author: gb9t
content:
Phase C /loop iter (2026-05-09): 2 Tier-3 docs added.

mm/swap.md (227 lines, 15 REQ / 10 AC, 1 open Q1 about default-enabling swap-page encryption) — swap subsystem: swapfile, swap_state cache, page_io for swap, per-memcg swap accounting, zswap. swap entry encoding, swapon/swapoff lifecycle, on-disk header byte-identity. Owns the mandatory L3 swap-slot exclusivity invariant from mm/00-overview.md.

mm/vmalloc.md (167 lines, 11 REQ / 11 AC, 0 open) — vmalloc / vfree / kvmalloc / vmap / vmap_pfn. Lazy-free queue. Huge-page-backed vmalloc. /proc/vmallocinfo format-identical.

Total Tier-3 docs: 22 + 2 hubs (kernel/locking, kernel/sched). The mm core is now substantially complete: page-allocator, slab, virtual-memory, mmap, page-cache, reclaim, swap, vmalloc all drafted. Remaining mm: zsmalloc (small), thp, hugetlb, migration-compaction, ksm, userfaultfd, memcg, numa-mempolicy, memory-hotplug, memory-failure, bootmem, percpu, hmm, sanitizers, damon, mm-debug, maccess.
